trivia_bullets.text: Affa is a named settlement on Zendikar that survived the Eldrazi invasion by relocating into a large underground cavern. [WebSearch: MTG Salvation Zendikar world lore article] The card's flavor text — 'Through all the terrors we face, I hold on to the memory of the world before the Eldrazi came. I'd like to see that world again.' — is an unnamed civilian voice speaking to the physical and psychological toll of the Eldrazi occupation during the Battle for Zendikar/OGW era. [Scryfall]

Affa Protector is a 1/4 Human Soldier Ally with Vigilance for 2W — a defensive statline that matches its thematic role as a wall-holding defender. It is pauper-legal and penny-dreadful legal. [Scryfall] EDHREC rank 26269 reflects narrow competitive appeal outside dedicated Ally-tribal builds.
Art by Izzy (Sahana D. Mohan), a Seattle-based illustrator with a long MTG credential list. Affa Protector is her only OGW credit per Scryfall. [Scryfall]
